metadata.policy: Do not present quarantined items as verified claims.

items.label: Functional Attribution Cockpit v1
items.reason: HubSpot capture path is BLOCKED and contact-level capture proof is not available in the approved evidence chain.
items.blocked_claim: Verified full-chain attribution, revenue attribution, ROI certainty, SQL/pipeline certainty, client-facing attribution certainty, or public 99/100 attribution claim
items.risk: HIGH if dashboard implies verified conversion, revenue, ROI, SQL, pipeline, or attribution certainty.
items.allowed_use: Internal Founder-visible evidence tracking and product testing only
items.crm_status: No HubSpot write. No CRM update.
